metrics.propose_text:
{
  "hypothesis": "Volume-scaled momentum predicts forward return with improved signal stability.",
  "concise_knowledge": "When momentum is scaled by volume, the predictive power is enhanced during high-liquidity periods.",
  "concise_observation": "The previous hypothesis showed improved IC with volume confirmation, but further refinement is needed for stability.",
  "concise_justification": "Volume reflects market participation, so scaling momentum by volume provides a more reliable indicator of future returns during active trading periods.",
  "concise_specification": "Volume-scaled 10-day momentum, normalized by volume, predicts 5-day forward return with enhanced stability."
}

propose_json.hypothesis: Volume-scaled momentum predicts forward return with improved signal stability.

PriceMomentumVolume.description: Normalized 10-day price momentum multiplied by z-scored volume growth.

VolumeMomentum.description: Z-scored 5-day volume growth multiplied by price momentum.

VolumeReversal.description: Z-scored 20-day volume change as a reversal signal.
